description: Replace Firebase with Supabase as the complete backend solution including authentication, database, and real-time features with offline-first support

userStories.title: Setup Supabase client and configuration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Supabase configured in the project so I can build features on top of it.
acceptanceCriteria: Add environment variables to .env.example: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY

userStories.title: Create profiles table migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a profiles table to store user display names and metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: Create supabase/migrations/ directory if not exists
Create migration file for profiles table with columns: id (UUID, FK to auth.users), display_name, created_at, updated_at
Enable RLS - users can only read/write own profile
Create trigger to auto-create profile on user signup

userStories.title: Create workouts table migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a workouts table to store parsed workout configurations.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration file for workouts table
Columns: id (UUID), user_id (FK), name, raw_input, parsed_config (JSONB), is_favorite, created_at, updated_at
Enable RLS - users can only access own workouts

userStories.title: Create workout_sessions table migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a sessions table to track completed workout history.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration file for workout_sessions table
Columns: id, user_id, workout_id (nullable FK), workout_snapshot (JSONB), started_at, completed_at, duration_seconds, status
Enable RLS - users can only access own sessions

userStories.title: Create user_preferences table migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a preferences table to store user settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration file for user_preferences table
Columns: user_id (PK, FK), audio_enabled, voice_type, theme, default_rest_seconds, countdown_seconds, updated_at
Enable RLS - users can only access own preferences

userStories.title: Create Supabase Auth store - core state
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Pinia store to manage Supabase auth state.
acceptanceCriteria: Define state: user, session, loading, error
Define TypeScript interfaces for User and Session

userStories.title: Implement auth store - signUp method
userStories.description: As a new user, I want to create an account with email and password.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement signUp(email, password) method in supabaseAuthStore
Handle email confirmation flow (check for email_confirm requirement)
Store user in Pinia state on success
Handle errors: email taken, weak password, invalid email

userStories.title: Implement auth store - signIn method
userStories.description: As a returning user, I want to sign in with my email and password.
acceptanceCriteria: Return appropriate error messages for invalid credentials

userStories.title: Implement auth store - signOut method
userStories.description: As a user, I want to sign out of my account.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear user and session from Pinia state

userStories.title: Implement auth store - session persistence
userStories.description: As a user, I want to stay logged in when I refresh or reopen the app.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement initialize() method that calls supabase.auth.getSession
Update Pinia store on auth state changes

userStories.title: Implement auth store - password reset
userStories.description: As a user, I want to reset my password if I forget it.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement updatePassword(newPassword) for the reset flow
Handle reset link callback (RECOVERY event in onAuthStateChange)

userStories.title: Implement auth store - Google OAuth
userStories.description: As a user, I want to sign in with my Google account.

userStories.title: Update LoginView for Supabase
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to update LoginView to use Supabase auth store.
acceptanceCriteria: Update LoginView.vue to import and use supabaseAuthStore
Replace Firebase auth calls with Supabase methods
Redirect to home/timer page on success
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Update SignUpView for Supabase
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to update SignUpView to use Supabase auth store.
acceptanceCriteria: Update SignUpView.vue to import and use supabaseAuthStore
Replace Firebase auth calls with Supabase signUp method
Handle email confirmation message if required
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: SignUp functionality is integrated into LoginView.vue via isLogin toggle. Added dedicated signUpSuccess state and proper email confirmation message.

userStories.title: Add Google sign-in button to auth views
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see and use Google sign-in option.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Google sign-in button to LoginView.vue
Add Google sign-in button to SignUpView.vue
Show loading state while OAuth is processing
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Google sign-in button was already implemented in LoginView.vue as part of US-013/US-014. The combined login/signup view shows contextual text ('Sign in with Google' vs 'Sign up with Google') based on isLogin state.

userStories.title: Create or update ForgotPasswordView
userStories.description: As a user, I want a page to request password reset.
acceptanceCriteria: Form with email input and submit button
Show success message after email sent
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Created dedicated ForgotPasswordView.vue with email form and success/error handling. Added /forgot-password route. Also updated router to use supabaseAuthStore.

userStories.title: Remove Firebase dependencies
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to remove Firebase to reduce bundle size and complexity.
acceptanceCriteria: Update any remaining Firebase imports throughout codebase
userStories.notes: Removed Firebase package and 82 dependencies. Deleted firebase.ts, authStore.ts, useAuth.ts, authErrors.ts. Updated api.ts, ProfileMenu.vue, main.ts, router/index.ts to use Supabase auth. Vite build passes. Pre-existing TS errors remain but are unrelated to Firebase removal.

userStories.title: Create workout service - save and get single
userStories.description: As a user, I want to save my parsed workout and retrieve it by ID.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement saveWorkout(workout: ParsedWorkout, name: string): Promise<Workout>
Save includes raw input and parsed config to Supabase
Throws error if not found or not owned
userStories.notes: Created workoutService.ts with Workout interface, saveWorkout and getWorkout functions. Uses supabase.auth.getUser() to get current user, stores raw_text in raw_input field.

userStories.title: Create workout service - list, update, delete
userStories.description: As a user, I want to list, update, and delete my workouts.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement getWorkouts(): Promise<Workout[]> returning workouts sorted by updated_at desc
Implement updateWorkout(id, updates) for name and is_favorite
userStories.notes: Added getWorkouts() with updated_at desc sorting, updateWorkout() with WorkoutUpdate interface for name/is_favorite, deleteWorkout() returning void. All use RLS for security. Note: delete returns no error if row doesn't exist (Supabase behavior with RLS).

userStories.title: Create session service - start and complete
userStories.description: As a user, I want my workout session tracked when I start and complete the timer.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement startSession(workout, workoutId?): Promise<Session> with status 'in_progress'
Implement completeSession(sessionId, durationSeconds) setting status to 'completed'
userStories.notes: Created sessionService.ts with Session interface and SessionStatus type. startSession stores workout_snapshot and sets status to 'in_progress'. completeSession updates status, completed_at timestamp, and duration_seconds.

userStories.title: Create session service - abandon and history
userStories.description: As a user, I want incomplete sessions marked as abandoned and to see my history.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement abandonSession(sessionId): Promise<void> setting status to 'abandoned'
Implement getSessionHistory(limit = 50): Promise<Session[]> sorted by started_at desc

userStories.title: Create preferences service
userStories.description: As a user, I want my preferences saved and loaded automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Auto-create default preferences if none exist (upsert)

userStories.title: Add Save Workout button to Timer View
userStories.description: As a user, I want to save my workout after parsing it.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Save Workout' button to timer header/view
Shows modal or input to enter workout name
Button disabled or shows 'Saved' indicator if already saved
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create My Workouts page - list view
userStories.description: As a user, I want a page to see my saved workouts.
acceptanceCriteria: Fetch and list saved workouts using workoutService.getWorkouts
Display workout name and created date
Show empty state when no workouts saved
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add workout actions to My Workouts page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to load, favorite, and delete workouts from the list.
acceptanceCriteria: Click workout to load and navigate to timer
Add favorite toggle (star icon) calling updateWorkout
Add delete button with confirmation dialog
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create Workout History page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my workout history and stats.
acceptanceCriteria: List completed sessions with date, workout name (from snapshot), duration
Show basic stats: total workouts completed, total time
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add navigation to new pages
userStories.description: As a user, I want to navigate to My Workouts and History pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Add navigation links/buttons to main layout or header
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Setup offline storage with Dexie
userStories.description: As a developer, I need local IndexedDB storage for offline-first support.
acceptanceCriteria: Define local tables: workouts, sessions, preferences, syncQueue
Create CRUD methods for local storage operations

userStories.title: Implement offline mutation queue
userStories.description: As a user, I want changes made offline to be queued for sync.
acceptanceCriteria: Create sync queue table structure: id, table, operation, data, createdAt
Save mutations to queue when offline (check navigator.onLine)

userStories.title: Implement sync service
userStories.description: As a user, I want my offline changes synced automatically when online.
acceptanceCriteria: Detect online/offline status with event listeners
Process sync queue when online (iterate and apply to Supabase)
Clear queue items after successful sync

userStories.title: Enable real-time subscriptions
userStories.description: As a user, I want changes on other devices to appear in real-time.
acceptanceCriteria: Subscribe to workouts table changes using Supabase Realtime
Update local state/IndexedDB when remote changes detected

userStories.title: Handle offline state in UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to know when I'm offline and that my data is safe.
acceptanceCriteria: Show offline indicator in header when disconnected
Show 'Saved locally' confirmation for offline saves
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Generate TypeScript types from Supabase schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need TypeScript types for the database schema.
acceptanceCriteria: Document command: npx supabase gen types typescript --project-id <id> > src/types/supabase.ts
Update services to use generated types
